markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between CodeRabbit and GrowthX for content creation and marketing support.](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-augmented content creation with human editors, focusing on technical audiences](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [CodeRabbit faces content bottlenecks due to limited capacity, especially for technical writing](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [GrowthX's process involves an 8-week strategy sprint ($20k) followed by ongoing execution ($12k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Concerns raised about AI content quality, competition, and immediate capacity needs](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI for research and initial drafts, with human editors for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Creates custom knowledge bases and pipelines for each client](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Aims to publish and refresh content daily](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Tracks LLM visibility and SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

### CodeRabbit's Content Needs

  - [Currently facing bottlenecks in content production](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Head of Content (Amanda) handling various responsibilities beyond typical content duties](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Need for high-quality technical content, often written by developers](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

### GrowthX's Engagement Model

  - [8-week strategy and execution sprint ($20,000)](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Followed by 12-month growth execution ($12,000/month)](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Dedicated team of 4-6 people per client, non-competitive assignments](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)

### Content Quality and Expertise

  - [GrowthX editors are primarily editors, not necessarily domain experts](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [CodeRabbit values developer-written content with practical insights](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [GrowthX can augment research and optimization but may not produce highly technical tutorials](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Timeline and Capacity

  - [GrowthX typically has a 4-6 week lead time for new client kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
  - [CodeRabbit expressed need for immediate capacity increase](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1961.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send additional details, including workshop replay and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more information on pricing and long-term relationship structure](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [CodeRabbit team to discuss internally and consider GrowthX's offering](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [Potential follow-up on immediate capacity needs and timeline concerns](https://fathom.video/share/4RKzMpEVcGBaYi_neBi9qzLV-8E4RxeT?tab=summary&timestamp=1969.0)
